oathbreakers-greatsword.name: Oathbreaker's Greatsword
oathbreakers-greatsword.description: Castellus's blade, reforged in the Wellspring's black iron. It remembers every oath its wielder ever broke — and channels that guilt into devastating force. The edge never dulls. The weight never lessens. The whispers never stop.

thessalys-true-grimoire.name: Thessaly's True Grimoire
thessalys-true-grimoire.description: The complete, uncorrupted version of Thessaly's research. Every page pulses with controlled corruption — formulas that turn despair into raw arcane power. Reading it feels like drowning and flying simultaneously.

cloak-of-the-drowned.name: Cloak of the Drowned
cloak-of-the-drowned.description: Woven from the shadows of those who drowned in the Wellspring. It moves like water and smoke, bending light around its wearer. Those who wear it can step between moments — but sometimes the drowned reach through the fabric.

crown-of-silenced-prayers.name: Crown of Silenced Prayers
crown-of-silenced-prayers.description: The golden ward-threads from Ashenmaw's walls, purified and rewoven into a circlet. Every prayer that was silenced by the corruption now echoes through this crown, granting its wearer divine clarity beyond mortal limits.

bow-of-the-bone-chorus.name: Bow of the Bone Chorus
bow-of-the-bone-chorus.description: Carved from the Bone Amalgam's central spine and strung with golden ward-thread. Each arrow fired hums with the frequency of the Ossuary's chorus — a sound that disrupts corruption and strengthens the natural order.
